meaning: n.主任,主管,导演,(机关)首长,(团体)理事,(公司)董事,指挥仪,控制器
examples: The director has the most to lose.
She has only the director over her.
We could write a letter to the director.
Pinnacle's managing director Graham Reed said this development was "a complete surprise and shock to us".
Tom Bird, the Globe to Globe festival director, spent months searching the world for Shakespeare performers.
